import { useState } from 'react'; import React from 'react'; import './Ttc.css'; import T1 from '../../Assets/guide-bush.jpg'; import T2 from '../../Assets/liner bushes1.webp'; import T3 from '../../Assets/tool-room-components.jpg'; const Ttc = () => { const [r1, setR1] = useState(true); const [r2, setR2] = useState(false); const [r3, setR3] = useState(false); const clkHnd1 = () => { setR1(true); setR2(false); setR3(false); }; const clkHnd2 = () => { setR1(false); setR2(true); setR3(false); }; const clkHnd3 = () => { setR1(false); setR2(false); setR3(true); }; const clkHnd4 = () => { setR1(false); setR2(false); setR3(false); }; return (

Total Toom Component

{r1 &&
Name Detail
Matrial H13,THAISON,ORVAR SEPREAM
Head Shape Round
Size Customized
Country of Origin Made in INDIA
Location Pune

Product Decription

To let patrons have best products, experts offer Guide Bush. This bush is light in weight and superior in finishing. These products have longer life and accessibility from the market in many sizes. Easy to install, offered bush is damage resistant quality ensured by industry professionals.

Features

  • Small size
  • Durable
  • Anti corrosive
} {r2 &&
Name Detail
Usage/Application Industrial
Shape Cylindrical
Country of Origin Made in INDIA
Location Pune

Product Decription

Small in size, these Liner Bushes are made of ductile metal that is recommended by industry experts. This bush is superior in finishing and made by industry professionals using highly technical machines and ductile metal. These bushes are available in the market in various sizes and at genuine price

Features

  • Best finish
  • Light weight
  • Longer life
} {r3 &&
Name Detail
MatrialCountry of Origin Made in India
usage Industrial
type NEW
location Pune
application Tool Room components

Product Decription

Leveraging on our vast industry experience, we are offering a broad collection of Tool Room Component. It is precisely engineered by making use of quality tested metal alloy with the help of pioneering techniques by our adroit professionals. This component finds its best usage in metal working, rock excavation, wood working and wood carpentry. In addition, this component can be easily purchased in varied dimensions at competitive rates.

Features

  • Accurate dimension
  • High load bearing capacity
  • Smooth edges
}
) } export default Ttc
